title: asclepias oenotheroides
intro: Asclepias oenotheroides, also known as Butterfly Milkweed, is a perennial plant species in the milkweed family native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Asclepias oenotheroides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, although proper identification and dosing are essential to ensure safe use.
